tweets.author: reneil1337
tweets.text:
Great card 🤘

Little boy serves Ministral3 Instruct 8b 32k + Qwen3 VL Embedding 2b (top left) allowing the RTX2000 to handle TTS+STT (below that)

The tinybox serves Qwen3.5 122b: 128k context, 2x concurrency on 4x4090 + Cydonia: 24b 65k context, 2x concurrency on 2x4090 (right) https://t.co/K73cosLuit

Gm, and welcome to #ArtTank.

tweets.author: madebyoona
tweets.text:
every time i sit down to mint , i check my posture. 
am i hunched over or heart open? 
am i wearing my crown?
do i feel gratitude at my fingertips? 
then hope i get the edition size right the first time. 

Dear David, You Are Not Present With Me tomorrow!

tweets.author: madebyoona
tweets.text:
David is married, with kids. 

my next surveillance love letter goes live tomorrow - 3/18. https://t.co/glAa6KePMA

tweets.author: OVRtheReality
tweets.text:
People are just realizing something important.

One of the largest real-world visual datasets for AI was built by millions of users… without them even knowing it.

At Over the Reality, we believe this should work differently.
